_schema.description: Education data: degree + associateDegree + certifications. Validated at worker boot via app/data/education-schema.ts. Localizable string fields carry an optional `_es` sibling; missing siblings fall back to English. Dates are YYYY-MM (no day, no time).

degree.title: Bachelor of Science (B.S.) in Artificial Intelligence.
degree.summary: A Bachelor Degree completion program focused on machine learning, natural language processing, and strategic AI deployment.
degree.summary_es: Programa de finalización de Licenciatura enfocado en machine learning, procesamiento de lenguaje natural y despliegue estratégico de IA.
degree.description: The Bachelor's Degree in Artificial Intelligence at UBP is an intensive, professional degree completion program covering the full machine-learning stack — from foundational mathematics and neural-network architectures through training, fine-tuning, and production deployment of modern AI systems. The curriculum emphasizes hands-on work with deep-learning frameworks, NLP and large-language-model engineering, computer vision, and MLOps tooling for evaluating, monitoring, and scaling models in real systems. Coursework on AI governance and risk frameworks (NIST AI RMF, ISO/IEC 42001) rounds out the program so graduates can ship AI responsibly, not just build it.
degree.description_es: La Licenciatura en Inteligencia Artificial de la UBP es un programa intensivo de finalización de carrera que cubre todo el stack de machine learning — desde matemáticas fundamentales y arquitecturas de redes neuronales hasta entrenamiento, fine-tuning y despliegue en producción de sistemas modernos de IA. El plan de estudios se enfoca en trabajo práctico con frameworks de deep learning, NLP e ingeniería de modelos de lenguaje grandes, visión por computadora y herramientas de MLOps para evaluar, monitorear y escalar modelos en sistemas reales. Los cursos de gobernanza de IA y marcos de riesgo (NIST AI RMF, ISO/IEC 42001) completan el programa para que los egresados puedan implementar IA de forma responsable, no solo construirla.

associateDegree.title: Software Development and Quality Control Associate Degree
associateDegree.title_es: Tecnicatura Universitaria en Desarrollo de Software y Control de Calidad
associateDegree.institution: Universidad del Norte Santo Tomas de Aquino
associateDegree.summary: A 3-year undergraduate degree focusing on end-to-end web development, database management, and advanced QA methodologies.
associateDegree.summary_es: Carrera universitaria de 3 años enfocada en desarrollo web integral, administración de bases de datos y metodologías avanzadas de QA.
associateDegree.description: The University Degree in Software Development and Quality at UNSTA delivers an end-to-end technical education combining modern programming pipelines with rigorous software assurance standards. The comprehensive curriculum spans foundational algorithms, paradigms, and database administration before moving into specialized tracks for Front-End and Back-End development. Graduates are trained to lead automated testing cycles, implement strict quality control metrics, evaluate commercial software dependencies against strict business requirements, and execute cross-functional projects within agile, multi-disciplinary team environments.
associateDegree.description_es: La Tecnicatura Universitaria en Desarrollo de Software y Control de Calidad de la UNSTA brinda una formación técnica integral que combina pipelines de programación modernos con estándares rigurosos de aseguramiento de software. El plan de estudios abarca algoritmos fundamentales, paradigmas y administración de bases de datos antes de avanzar hacia tracks especializados de Front-End y Back-End. Los egresados están capacitados para liderar ciclos de testing automatizado, implementar métricas estrictas de control de calidad, evaluar dependencias de software comercial frente a requisitos de negocio, y ejecutar proyectos transversales en entornos ágiles y multidisciplinarios.

certifications.title: Certification
certifications.description: Anthropic's introductory Claude course — API basics, prompt engineering fundamentals, tool use, and MCP overview.
certifications.description_es: Curso introductorio de Anthropic sobre Claude — bases de la API, fundamentos de prompt engineering, tool use y overview de MCP.

certifications.title: Certification
certifications.description: Anthropic's foundational certification for AI-application architects — covers Claude API surface, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, and prompt engineering patterns.
certifications.description_es: Certificación fundacional de Anthropic para arquitectos de aplicaciones de IA — cubre la API de Claude, tool use, MCP, agentes, caching y patrones de prompt engineering.

certifications.description_es: Level 1 Certificate in English (ESOL), First Certificate in English
